title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 260.429 - No permit in non-karst area of state over groundwater divide
text:
260.429.  No permit in non-karst area of state over groundwater divide. — In non-karst areas of the state, the department of natural resources shall not issue a hazardous waste facility permit for a proposed commercial hazardous waste landfill, if such landfill would be located directly over a groundwater divide.  The department of natural resources shall review on a site-by-site basis, whether a proposed site is in a non-karst region.
(L. 1993 S.B. 80, et al. § 16)
